your mood

written for you

I wrote you
something.

❤️
tap to open

Nadia,

I don't say enough of what I feel. So I'm saying it here, where I can take my time and get it right.

You are one of the most genuinely beautiful people I've ever known. Not just the way you look, but the way you exist. The way you laugh. The way you think. The way you love without making it complicated.

I notice everything about you. The small things most people miss. And every single one of them makes me more certain that I'm exactly where I'm supposed to be.

You make me want to be better. Not because you demand it, but because you deserve it. And that's a rare kind of thing.

So this is me, choosing you. Clearly. Quietly. Every day.

always yours ❤️
"Some moments just need
to be felt quietly…"
You don't have to do anything right now.
Just sit with this for a moment.
I love you.
Even in the quiet moments.
Especially in the quiet ones.
